reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente no tenían nafta, pero el playero fue muy amable, nos ofreció el uso de los sanitarios y limpiarnos los vidrios del auto. Todo de una manera muy cordial.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, they didn't have any gas, but the beach attendant was very kind, offering us the use of the restrooms and cleaning our car windows. All in a very cordial manner.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURvb3AyMlpREAE

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Ubicado en la salida de Cachi. Carga obligada de combustible para viajeros. Hacia el sur por ruta 40 recién hay combustible en Cafayate

(Translated by Google)
Located at the exit of Cachi. A must-stop for travelers. Further south on Route 40, fuel is only available in Cafayate.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNvc3NyRWJREAE

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio con nafta súper, premium,  diesel común y premium, de 7:30 a 22 hs, a veces no tiene nafta, buena atención de playeros, baños muy limpios, se puede pagar con tarjeta

(Translated by Google)
Gas station with super and premium gasoline, regular and premium diesel, open from 7:30 am to 10 pm, sometimes out of gasoline, good service from attendants, very clean restrooms, card payments accepted
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14085656854126721512/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1LWJpMmZ3EAE
